notes:
Four visual regressions from v1.0.45, all caught on the post-release install:

### Icon fix #1 — multi-resolution `icon.ico` restored

v1.0.45 collapsed `icon.ico` from 64KB multi-res down to a 592-byte single-resolution frame while trying to remove a residual "white dot" artifact via PIL resampling. The result was a blurry Taskbar / Alt-Tab icon at every size because Windows had to upscale a tiny 16-or-32px frame.

v1.0.46 takes the opposite approach: re-fetch the clean v1.0.44 source PNGs from git and zero ONLY the bottom-left artifact rectangle (`x<19, y>=218` in the 256 source — 198 of 198 visible pixels in that rect are non-green sliver, only 1 stray near-green AA pixel). The fixed 256 source then drives a proper multi-resolution `icon.ico` (16/32/48/64/128/256, ~62KB). Deployed Tauri PNGs (32/64/128/128@2x/icon.png) re-exported via Lanczos from the fixed sources.

The fix lives in `branding/scripts/fix_icon_white_dot.py` so the cleanup is reproducible.

### Sidebar logo back to fixed 96px

v1.0.45 set `.wordmark-asa { width: 100%; max-height: 40px }`, intending to fill the sidebar interior. But the new Copilot wordmark raster is 1184×583 (taller than v1.0.44's source), so at the sidebar's ~180px interior it rendered ~88px tall — hero-sized where there should be a section-header-sized brand mark.

Reverted to the brand spec: `width: 96px; height: auto`. Renders 96×47 from the current source, regardless of future aspect-ratio changes.

### "MT5 Connection" reverted to "Bridge"

The Bridge connects to more than just MetaTrader 5 — it's the general broker/platform connection layer. v1.0.45's "MT5 Connection" rename incorrectly scoped it. Reverted in `dashboard.html` (nav-item label, section h2, error-message wording).

### Update box compaction

v1.0.45 split the update card body into a column with an inner sp-4 padded div stacking the auto-update checkbox above a row of `[empty status span | Check now button]`. With the toast-style status blank by default, this left ~40px of dead vertical space.

Collapsed to a single row: `[checkbox] [status flex:1] [Check now]`. Card height drops from ~140px to ~100px.

### Files touched

- `branding/png/icon-s-{16,32,48,64,128,256,512}.png`, `branding/png/icon.ico` — surgical fix from v1.0.44 source
- `tray-app/src-tauri/icons/{32x32,64x64,128x128,128x128@2x,icon}.png`, `icon.ico` — re-deployed
- `branding/scripts/fix_icon_white_dot.py` — new, reproducible
- `static/css/components.css` — `.wordmark-asa` width back to 96px
- `dashboard.html` — Bridge label revert + update-box layout collapse
- `.gitignore` — ignore per-user `.claude/launch.json`
